evidence_objects.description: Source intake of StackStorm (StackStorm/st2) completed: 3016 files inventoried, SHA256 verified, boundary validation PASS
Structural scan produced 3525 nodes, 3468 CONTAINS edges, 57 directory-based clusters from StackStorm microservice architecture
SRC classification: 2229 PRIMARY (63.2%), 473 SUPPORT, 823 PERIPHERAL. 373 TESTING nodes, 100 CONFIG nodes. Core source ratio 0.632 — lower than NetBox (0.728) due to larger contrib/tooling surface
Code graph produced 4291 AST-extracted import relationships across 1333 Python files. Microservice package boundaries visible in import topology
Structural centrality computed: 984 nodes analyzed, 976 INTERFACE_BOUNDARY, 8 VALIDATION_SUPPORT. pants-plugins/uses_services/platform_rules.py highest in-degree (7)

57 structural clusters identified — 8 core microservice packages (st2common 699, st2tests 1019, st2client 150, st2reactor 136, st2api 130, st2actions 110, st2auth 69, st2stream 53) plus contrib (798), pants-plugins (85), conf (24), scripts (32)

Pipeline detected 8 distinct microservice packages each with independent setup.cfg/setup.py, own test suites, and internal module hierarchies. st2common serves as shared library consumed by all other services
LENS v2 structural-only rendering operational for StackStorm at S1 qualification level. 57 clusters projected through INTELLIGENCE BLOCKED posture with full topology grid

NetBox top-3 cluster concentration: 98.0%. StackStorm top-3 cluster concentration: 71.4%. Observed in one monolithic Django specimen vs one microservice specimen. Whether this pattern generalizes to other monolith/microservice pairs is unknown — two data points establish a comparative observation, not an architectural law.

NetBox: 24 clusters, 105.8 nodes/cluster. StackStorm: 57 clusters, 61.8 nodes/cluster. The microservice specimen produces more clusters with lower density. This is consistent with the expectation that explicit package boundaries create more top-level directories, but we cannot attribute the difference solely to architecture style — project age, team conventions, and build system choices may also contribute.

NetBox core_source_ratio: 0.728. StackStorm core_source_ratio: 0.632. The difference comes primarily from StackStorm having 373 TESTING nodes (vs 132) and 100 CONFIG nodes (vs 6). This is a measured difference in two specimens, not a claim about microservice packaging overhead in general. A third specimen would begin to indicate whether this pattern recurs.

StackStorm largest cluster is st2tests (1019 nodes), exceeding any production service cluster. NetBox tests (132 nodes) are a small fraction of its application cluster (2129 nodes). In this specific comparison, the microservice specimen has test mass exceeding production mass. Whether this is a property of microservice architectures or of this particular project is not established.

CONTAINS-edge-to-node ratio: NetBox 0.99, StackStorm 0.98. These are close values observed in two Python specimens. This proximity is noted but not interpreted — CONTAINS edges reflect directory structure, so near-1.0 ratios may simply reflect that most files sit one level deep. Additional specimens are needed before any claim about edge density convergence.

40.3s code graph upgraded with multi-package import resolution. Before: 4291 relationships, ~0 resolved IMPORTS. After: 8254 relationships, 4006 resolved IMPORTS (2070 cross-package, 1936 intra-package). st2common/__init__.py identified as gravitational center (245 inbound imports). Centrality role distribution changed from 976 INTERFACE_BOUNDARY / 8 VALIDATION_SUPPORT to 1 RE_EXPORT_HUB / 1 UTILITY_HUB / 720 INTERFACE_BOUNDARY / 404 VALIDATION_SUPPORT.

40.3s code graph upgraded with multi-package import resolution. Before: 4291 relationships, ~0 resolved IMPORTS. After: 8254 relationships, 4006 resolved IMPORTS (2070 cross-package, 1936 intra-package). st2common/__init__.py identified as gravitational center (245 inbound imports). Centrality changed from 976 INTERFACE_BOUNDARY / 8 VALIDATION_SUPPORT to 1 RE_EXPORT_HUB / 1 UTILITY_HUB / 720 INTERFACE_BOUNDARY / 404 VALIDATION_SUPPORT.

hero_moments.discovery: st2common hub-and-spoke inversion: the shared library (st2common) has 8 import edges reaching UP to service-layer packages — 3 in production code (datastore.py → st2client, inquiry.py → st2actions/container) and 5 in tests. In a 12-package microservice system where 72.8% of 2,070 cross-package imports target st2common as the foundation, these upward dependencies invert the documented architecture. The hub depends on its spokes.

semantic_propositions.derivation_rationale: Cross-domain import matrix shows 366 edges between contrib and st2common. Unidirectional coupling.
